use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons triggering actions or form submissions
Secondary action buttons in toolbars, cards, or navigation elements
Destructive action buttons for delete, remove, or warning operations
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces like toolbars or header actions
Inline link-style buttons for text navigation within content
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports multiple variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles with three size options. Features standard accessibility states like focus-visible rings and disabled opacity. Designed as a foundational atomic component for building larger UI systems across any industry platform.
